Soldier: 76

The target of an international manhunt, the vigilante known as Soldier: 76 wages a personal war to expose the truth behind Overwatch's collapse.

Damage

Specialist

Unknown

Jan 27 (Age: 58)

Abilities

Heavy Pulse RifleSprintBiotic FieldHelix RocketsTactical Visor

Heavy Pulse Rifle

Automatic assault weapon.

Sprint

Run faster while moving forward.

Biotic Field

Deploy a field that heals you and your allies.

Helix Rockets

Launch a volley of explosive rockets.

Tactical Visor

Automatically aims your weapon at targets in view.

Keys displayed are defaults for PC. They are configurable in game.

Perks

Unlock mid-match upgrades to outsmart, outplay, and dominate the fight. As the action heats up, choose game-changing abilities to amplify your Hero’s power and evolve your strategy in real time.

Minor Perk

(Level 2)

Helix Propulsion

Helix Rockets' projectile speed is increased by 50%.

Tactical Salvo

During Tactical Visor, Helix Rockets' cooldown is reduced by 80% and no longer interrupts firing Heavy Pulse Rifle.

Major Perk

(Level 3)

Full Stride

Sprint's movement speed bonus gradually increases by an additional 25% over 2 seconds.

Stim Pack

Stim Pack replaces Biotic Field. On use, Soldier: 76 heals for 30 health per second and gains 20% increased attack speed for 5 seconds.

Keys displayed are defaults for PC. They are configurable in game.

Stadium Powers

Stadium Powers are ability-changing upgrades obtainable in the Armory. Each hero has 12 unique Powers to choose from.

Super Visor

After using Helix Rocket, activate Tactical Visor for 0.5s.

Peripheral Pulse

During Tactical Visor, Pulse Rifle shoots at 1 additional enemy, dealing 50% reduced damage.

Man On The Run

During Sprint, restore 10% of your Ammo every 1s and increase your Max Ammo by 10% until you reload, stacking up to 10 times.

Chaingun

While continuously shooting Pulse Rifle, each shot grants 0.4% Weapon Power, stacking up to 100 times.

Double Helix

Helix Rocket fires a second homing Helix Rocket that deals 70% reduced damage.

Cratered

Increase Helix Rocket explosion radius by 40% and explosion damage by 15%.

Hunker Down

When Helix Rocket deals damage, create a Biotic Field with a 50% reduced duration at your position.

Back Off

Enemies within your Biotic Field take damage equal to 100% of­ its healing output.

On Me!

Biotic Field moves with you and grants you 20% increased Max Life while active.

Track and Field

During Sprint, Biotic Field cooldown refreshes 150% faster.

Frontliners

Allies in range of your Biotic Field when it spawns gain Overhealth equal to 25% of your max Life for 3s.

Biotic Bullseye

While in Biotic Field, critical hits restore 10% Max Ammo and extend the duration of Biotic Field by 0.5s, up to 5s.

Super Visor

After using Helix Rocket, activate Tactical Visor for 0.5s.

Peripheral Pulse

During Tactical Visor, Pulse Rifle shoots at 1 additional enemy, dealing 50% reduced damage.

Man On The Run

During Sprint, restore 10% of your Ammo every 1s and increase your Max Ammo by 10% until you reload, stacking up to 10 times.

Chaingun

While continuously shooting Pulse Rifle, each shot grants 0.4% Weapon Power, stacking up to 100 times.

Double Helix

Helix Rocket fires a second homing Helix Rocket that deals 70% reduced damage.

Cratered

Increase Helix Rocket explosion radius by 40% and explosion damage by 15%.

Hunker Down

When Helix Rocket deals damage, create a Biotic Field with a 50% reduced duration at your position.

Back Off

Enemies within your Biotic Field take damage equal to 100% of­ its healing output.

On Me!

Biotic Field moves with you and grants you 20% increased Max Life while active.

Track and Field

During Sprint, Biotic Field cooldown refreshes 150% faster.

Frontliners

Allies in range of your Biotic Field when it spawns gain Overhealth equal to 25% of your max Life for 3s.

Biotic Bullseye

While in Biotic Field, critical hits restore 10% Max Ammo and extend the duration of Biotic Field by 0.5s, up to 5s.

More on Stadium

Story

The former commander of Overwatch turned physically-enhanced vigilante, Jack Morrison travels the world hunting those responsible for the downfall of Overwatch. It is unknown whether he seeks justice... or revenge.

VIGILANTE

Soldier: 76 revealed himself in a string of attacks that crisscrossed the globe, targeting financial institutions, shadowy corporations, and secure Overwatch facilities. Though to the outside world his motives are inscrutable, there are those who claim that he is a former Overwatch agent, determined to shed light on the conspiracy that brought down the organization.

Few would believe that former Overwatch Strike Commander Jack Morrison is the face behind Soldier: 76, given that Morrison was presumed dead during the destruction of Overwatch’s Swiss Headquarters. But the hardened veteran survived, perhaps due to the fact that he was biologically enhanced and trained as a member of the United States Soldier Enhancement Program, a top secret agency which surfaced only during the most desperate hour of the Omnic Crisis. As such, Morrison possesses physical capabilities exceeding those of a conventional soldier's, as well as other augmentations that make him a peerless combatant. In addition, he utilizes a cutting-edge arsenal, much of it stolen in raids on Overwatch installations.

RECALL

Though Morrison did intercept Winston’s Overwatch recall broadcast, he remained singularly focused on his hunt for vengeance. The former commander came close to his prize in Egypt, where he crossed paths with several former Overwatch agents: his head of medical research, Dr. Angela Ziegler; captain, Ana Amari; and perhaps the biggest shock of all: Blackwatch Commander Gabriel Reyes, now hunting former Overwatch agents as the Reaper. Though Morrison fought the Reaper several times in Egypt, the wraith slipped through his fingers.

The search for answers goes on. Luckily, Soldier: 76 is unrelenting in his search to find those responsible for Overwatch's fall, and bring them to justice.
